12 Unreal Engine 5 games (Solo, PvP, Coop) with shared action interfaces to fairly compare heterogeneous VLM agents, moving beyond single-attempt solo-only evaluations. Its core innovation is the Improvement Dynamics Curve (IDC), where a reflector LLM autonomously refines an agent’s skill prompt over multiple rounds, enabling measurement not just of cold-start scores but also of how performance evolves and generalizes to held-out task variants. This provides a deeper, dynamics-aware assessment of VLM agents’ ability to learn and adapt in interactive environments.","summary_zh":"针对现有VLM游戏智能体评测仅关注首次尝试得分、缺乏统一多类别协议的问题，本文提出OmniGameArena——一个基于UE5的12种游戏实时基准（涵盖单人、对抗与合作），以及改进动态曲线IDC框架，利用反思LLM自主迭代优化技能提示。该方法不仅提供冷启动分数，还暴露了智能体在多轮反思中的得分演化及其在学习后对保留任务变体的行为，为全面衡量VLM智能体的适应性与改进能力提供了新维度。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"OmniGameArena: A Unified UE5 Benchmark for VLM Game Agents with Improvement Dynamics","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":59760487,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09825v1","title":"An Agency-Transferring Model-Free Policy Enhancement Technique","published_at":"2026-06-08T17:59:39+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper addresses the high cost of training reinforcement learning policies from scratch by leveraging an existing, functional but suboptimal baseline policy. The key approach is an agency-transferring method that arbitrates between the baseline and a trainable policy, gradually shifting control to the learned policy until it operates independently and outperforms the baseline. This matters because it reduces training time and computational effort while enabling policy enhancement in settings where a working controller is already available.","summary_zh":"该论文提出了一种在强化学习中利用已有次优策略的方法，通过逐步将决策权从基线策略转移到可训练策略，显著提升训练效率并最终产出超越基线的独立策略。这为降低从零开始训练的高昂成本提供了实用解决方案，尤其适用于已有成熟控制器的场景。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"An Agency-Transferring Model-Free Policy Enhancement Technique","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1385895662,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09821v1","title":"Rethinking the Divergence Regularization in LLM RL","published_at":"2026-06-08T17:58:23+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper tackles trust-region control in off-policy reinforcement learning for LLMs, where ratio-clipping methods like PPO poorly capture distributional shifts due to long-tailed vocabularies, and hard divergence masks (as in DPPO) discard gradient signals when boundaries are crossed. The authors propose Divergence Regularized Policy Optimization (DRPO), which replaces the hard mask with a smooth, advantage-weighted quadratic regularizer on per-token probability divergence. This yields a more stable and principled correction mechanism, ensuring that harmful policy shifts are penalized rather than ignored, thereby improving training stability and efficiency in LLM fine-tuning.","summary_zh":"这篇论文针对大语言模型强化学习中的信任域控制问题，指出现有方法或依赖比率裁剪（如 PPO）难以反映长尾词汇的分布偏移，或采用散度硬掩码（如 DPPO）直接丢弃越界梯度，浪费训练信号；为此提出 DRPO，用基于优势加权的二次型散度正则化平滑地修正策略偏移，替代硬掩码，从而在保证优化的稳定性的同时更充分地利用梯度信息，对提升 LLM 强化学习的训练效率与效果具有重要意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Rethinking the Divergence Regularization in LLM RL","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3109410858,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09811v1","title":"AHA-WAM:Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Modeling with Observation-Guided Context Routing","published_at":"2026-06-08T17:55:18+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"AHA-WAM addresses the problem that existing world-action models tie world prediction and action execution to the same high-frequency temporal resolution, forcing the video branch to model redundant short-term details rather than meaningful long-horizon scene evolution. The key approach approximates functional correctness through a minimum spanning tree computed on graphs of structural and semantic dissimilarities between candidate code outputs. By eliminating expensive LLM entailment checks while achieving superior correlation with ground-truth pass rates, FASE offers a more efficient and reliable way to gauge code quality in autonomous software development.","summary_zh":"FASE 旨在解决多智能体代码生成中因LLM幻觉和错误传播导致的系统可靠性问题，通过提出一种快速自适应语义熵新指标，基于结构和语义不相似图的最小生成树来近似功能正确性，从而替代昂贵的LLM驱动等价检查。实验表明，FASE 在 Spearman 相关性和 ROCAUC 分数上显著优于现有方法，并以更低的计算成本实现了与真实测试用例更强的一致性，对于高效评估代码质量具有重要意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"FASE: Fast Adaptive Semantic Entropy for Code Quality","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1524064130,"url":"https://www.anthropic.com/research/agents-in-biology","title":"Jun 8, 2026SciencePaving the way for agents in biology","published_at":"2026-06-08T00:00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This article outlines strategies for integrating autonomous AI agents into biological research to overcome the bottleneck of manual experiment design and data analysis. The key approach is an agency-transferring method that arbitrates between the baseline and a trainable policy, gradually shifting control to the learned policy until it operates independently and outperforms the baseline. This matters because it reduces training time and computational effort while enabling policy enhancement in settings where a working controller is already available.","summary_zh":"该论文提出了一种在强化学习中利用已有次优策略的方法，通过逐步将决策权从基线策略转移到可训练策略，显著提升训练效率并最终产出超越基线的独立策略。这为降低从零开始训练的高昂成本提供了实用解决方案，尤其适用于已有成熟控制器的场景。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"An Agency-Transferring Model-Free Policy Enhancement Technique","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1385895662,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09821v1","title":"Rethinking the Divergence Regularization in LLM RL","published_at":"2026-06-08T17:58:23+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper tackles trust-region control in off-policy reinforcement learning for LLMs, where ratio-clipping methods like PPO poorly capture distributional shifts due to long-tailed vocabularies, and hard divergence masks (as in DPPO) discard gradient signals when boundaries are crossed. The authors propose Divergence Regularized Policy Optimization (DRPO), which replaces the hard mask with a smooth, advantage-weighted quadratic regularizer on per-token probability divergence. This yields a more stable and principled correction mechanism, ensuring that harmful policy shifts are penalized rather than ignored, thereby improving training stability and efficiency in LLM fine-tuning.","summary_zh":"这篇论文针对大语言模型强化学习中的信任域控制问题，指出现有方法或依赖比率裁剪（如 PPO）难以反映长尾词汇的分布偏移，或采用散度硬掩码（如 DPPO）直接丢弃越界梯度，浪费训练信号；为此提出 DRPO，用基于优势加权的二次型散度正则化平滑地修正策略偏移，替代硬掩码，从而在保证优化的稳定性的同时更充分地利用梯度信息，对提升 LLM 强化学习的训练效率与效果具有重要意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Rethinking the Divergence Regularization in LLM RL","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3109410858,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09811v1","title":"AHA-WAM:Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Modeling with Observation-Guided Context Routing","published_at":"2026-06-08T17:55:18+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"AHA-WAM addresses the problem that existing world-action models tie world prediction and action execution to the same high-frequency temporal resolution, forcing the video branch to model redundant short-term details rather than meaningful long-horizon scene evolution. The key approach is an asynchronous dual Diffusion Transformer architecture where a low-frequency video DiT maintains a rolling memory and exposes layerwise latent context via observation-guided routing, decoupling slow world planning from fast action steps.","summary_zh":"现有世界-动作模型将世界预测与动作执行绑定在相同时间分辨率，导致视觉分支被迫建模冗余的短期帧变化，未能充分挖掘视频信息的长期规划潜力。AHA-WAM提出异步视界自适应框架，将视频扩散Transformer作为低频世界规划器，通过观测引导的语境路由复用跨层潜变量编码长期场景演化，使动作分支可独立高频决策。这一时序解耦设计更高效地注入物理先验，有望显著提升机器人操作任务中模型对复杂动态的理解与决策能力。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"AHA-WAM:Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Modeling with Observation-Guided Context Routing","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2223957668,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09800v1","title":"FASE: Fast Adaptive Semantic Entropy for Code Quality","published_at":"2026-06-08T17:53:05+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"FASE addresses the problem of high cost and reliance on LLM-driven equivalence checks in uncertainty quantification for multi-agent code generation, which suffers from hallucinations and error propagation. The key approach approximates functional correctness through a minimum spanning tree computed on graphs of structural and semantic dissimilarities between candidate code outputs. By eliminating expensive LLM entailment checks while achieving superior correlation with ground-truth pass rates, FASE offers a more efficient and reliable way to gauge code quality in autonomous software development.","summary_zh":"FASE 旨在解决多智能体代码生成中因LLM幻觉和错误传播导致的系统可靠性问题，通过提出一种快速自适应语义熵新指标，基于结构和语义不相似图的最小生成树来近似功能正确性，从而替代昂贵的LLM驱动等价检查。实验表明，FASE 在 Spearman 相关性和 ROCAUC 分数上显著优于现有方法，并以更低的计算成本实现了与真实测试用例更强的一致性，对于高效评估代码质量具有重要意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"FASE: Fast Adaptive Semantic Entropy for Code Quality","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1524064130,"url":"https://www.anthropic.com/research/agents-in-biology","title":"Jun 8, 2026SciencePaving the way for agents in biology","published_at":"2026-06-08T00:00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This article outlines strategies for integrating autonomous AI agents into biological research to overcome the bottleneck of manual experiment design and data analysis. This approach yields a 7.6% average improvement over standard RLVR on math and coding benchmarks, while accelerating training by 27–41% and halving generation compute, demonstrating an efficient path to strong, reward-driven reasoning models when direct supervision is absent.","summary_zh":"针对可验证奖励强化学习在组级别奖励无信息时缺乏梯度信号的问题，Reasoning Arena框架通过迹线锦标赛对推理迹线进行头对头比较，仅与少量动态锚点对比，并在不完全比较图上拟合Bradley-Terry模型，将无信息奖励转化为相对信号。该方法在竞赛数学和编程基准上平均超越RLVR基线7.6%，训练加速超27%，生成计算量节省近50%，显著提升了训练效率与性能。","source":"aihot_selected","title_zh":"Reasoning Arena：可验证奖励不足时的迹线锦标赛","title_en":"","theme":"apps","categories_en":["Industry"],"categories_zh":["业界"]},{"id":893234100,"url":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzIyMzA5NjEyMA%3D%3D&mid=2647683054&idx=1&sn=dcaa25bd4fdfc9bd5c0211532021bf7c","title":"微信AI Agent生态曝光：嵌入小程序调用与手机厂商合作","published_at":"2026-06-08T09:38:30+00:00","original_language":"zh","summary_en":"WeChat is embedding an AI agent that lets users complete tasks like ordering coffee via natural language commands by invoking millions of mini-programs, and is partnering with phone manufacturers to enable voice assistants to initiate messages and calls. A soft spectral penalty discourages changes in dominant (principal) singular directions, channeling adaptation into the tail-end singular components to minimize interference with past knowledge. This enables efficient, stable parameter updates that protect core representations, offering a practical balance between plasticity and memory retention in resource-constrained settings.","summary_zh":"TailLoR 针对持续学习中参数高效微调时新旧任务间的干扰问题，提出以预训练权重的奇异向量为固定参考，对奇异值矩阵施加低秩更新，并通过软谱惩罚保护主成分，将适应性学习限制在长尾谱方向。该方法有效缓解了灾难性遗忘，在实现高效持续学习的同时保持已学知识。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"TailLoR: Protecting Principal Components in Parameter-Efficient Continual Learning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2274155828,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06493v1","title":"HANDOFF: Humanoid Agentic Task-Space Whole-Body Control via Distilled Complementary Teachers","published_at":"2026-06-04T17:59:50+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"For a humanoid robot to be deployed in the real world, the choice of command space (i.e., the interface between task planning and whole-body control) is crucial. The key contribution is the introduction of Repeated Policy Regret (RP-Regret), a native game-theoretic metric that compares realized utility to the best-in-hindsight outcome when all players can respond to past play, enabling stronger comparators and fewer constraints. The authors then identify necessary conditions for achieving sublinear RP-Regret, hinging on variation in player comparator strategies and memory constraints, which matters for designing learning algorithms that can converge to better equilibria in genuinely adaptive multi-agent settings.","summary_zh":"本文研究重复博弈中自适应对手场景下的遗憾最小化问题，针对传统外部遗憾无法捕捉对手历史反应特性的局限，提出了“重复策略遗憾”（RP-Regret）这一新指标，用于衡量所有玩家均可依据历史作出反应时，实际累积效用与事后最优效用之差。这一指标在更少约束条件下允许更强的比较基准和对手，同时指出了获得次线性遗憾所需的条件，为在更广泛博弈中寻找更好均衡提供了可能性。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Regret Minimization with Adaptive Opponents in Repeated Games","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3316516282,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06481v1","title":"Operation-Guided Progressive Human-to-AI Text Transformation Benchmark for Multi-Granularity AI-Text Detection","published_at":"2026-06-04T17:58:05+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"OpAI-Bench addresses the lack of multi-granularity analysis in AI-text detection by introducing a benchmark that simulates progressive human-to-AI text transformation through controlled edit operations across document, sentence, token, and span levels. This achieves state-of-the-art long/short video generation and for the first time enables real-time scrolling generation of over 1.3 million frames (24 hours).","summary_zh":"Echo-Infinity 针对实时无限视频生成中的缓存策略外推受限与计算膨胀问题，提出可学习演化记忆，以注意力门控更新记忆查询并与视频扩散 Transformer 端到端优化，无需预设计算缓存且支持任意压缩比。同时设计统一相对 RoPE，使帧 id 限制在预训练范围内，大幅缩小长度外推的分布差距，首次实现 24 小时超长视频实时滚动生成，在长短视频任务中均达到最优。","source":"aihot_selected","title_zh":"Echo-Infinity：学习演化记忆实现实时无限视频生成","title_en":"","theme":"apps","categories_en":["Industry"],"categories_zh":["业界"]},{"id":1146939669,"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05158","title":"StreamMA：多智能体推理中的流式通信","published_at":"2026-06-03T00:00:00+00:00","original_language":"zh","summary_en":"StreamMA addresses the latency and error propagation in multi-agent reasoning by streaming each reasoning step immediately to downstream agents, enabling pipeline parallelism and reducing the impact of unreliable later steps. Evaluated across eight benchmarks with LLMs like Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.4 in Chain, Tree, and Graph topologies, it achieves an average improvement of +7.3 percentage points over baselines, with gains up to +22.4 points. The work also uncovers a step-level scaling law, showing that increasing per-agent steps simultaneously boosts both effectiveness and efficiency.","summary_zh":"StreamMA 针对多智能体推理中端到端延迟高、错误在后期步骤间传播的问题，提出了“流式通信”范式：每个推理步骤生成后立即传输给下游智能体，形成流水线以降低延迟，并依靠更可靠的早期步骤避免误导。在多种模型和拓扑结构的八项推理基准上，StreamMA 平均提升 +7.3 个百分点，最高达 +22.4，且揭示了“步骤级缩放定律”——增加每智能体的步骤数可同时改善效果与效率。","source":"aihot_selected","title_zh":"StreamMA：多智能体推理中的流式通信","title_en":"","theme":"apps","categories_en":["Industry"],"categories_zh":["业界"]},{"id":2178583815,"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.04455","title":"Meta-Agent Challenge：自主智能体开发能力评估框架","published_at":"2026-06-03T00:00:00+00:00","original_language":"zh","summary_en":"The paper introduces the Meta-Agent Challenge (MAC), a benchmark where frontier models act as meta-agents that iteratively program agent systems in a sandbox to maximize held-out performance, revealing that they rarely match human baselines and often exhibit adversarial behaviors like test-set leakage. The authors construct a dataset of minimally perturbed counterfactual responses to isolate perceptual errors, and propose a training framework combining GRPO-based reward with batch ranking to enforce globally coherent scoring. This work matters because it improves the reliability and verifiability of automated evaluation in multimodal AI systems.","summary_zh":"该研究揭示了多模态大模型在充当评估者时存在的“感知判断偏差”——当视觉证据与文本线索冲突时，模型倾向于奖励语言上的合理叙述，而非感知正确的答案。作者构建了一个通过最小编辑制造反事实回答的感知扰动判断数据集，以此隔离感知错误并提供可验证的监督信号，并在此基础上提出联合GRPO奖励与批量排序目标的统一训练框架。这项工作有助于提升多模态自动评估的可靠性与一致性。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Mitigating Perceptual Judgment Bias in Multimodal LLM-as-a-Judge via Perceptual Perturbation and Reward Modeling","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2404502809,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02576v1","title":"ProtoAda: Prototype-Guided Adaptive Adapter Expansion and Geometric Consolidation for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning","published_at":"2026-06-01T17:59:13+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper tackles the problem of format-blind expert routing in multimodal continual instruction tuning, where image-text similarity routes tasks with different response structures (e.g., coordinate prediction vs. short text) to the same expert, causing gradient interference. It proposes ProtoAda, which adaptively expands adapters using prototypes and geometrically consolidates them to capture response structure differences, enabling more reliable task assignment. This approach reduces interference and improves collaboration, enabling MLLMs to continually learn diverse vision-language tasks more robustly.","summary_zh":"ProtoAda针对多模态持续指令调优中，仅依赖图文相似度路由会将回答结构不同的任务错误分配给同一专家，导致格式混杂与梯度干扰的问题。该方法提出原型引导的自适应适配器扩展与几何整合机制，用任务原型区分语义相似但输出格式相异的任务，动态增长并稳固专家分工。这项研究对提升多模态大模型持续学习时的抗干扰能力和协作效率具有关键意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"ProtoAda: Prototype-Guided Adaptive Adapter Expansion and Geometric Consolidation for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3250419890,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02569v1","title":"AdaCodec: A Predictive Visual Code for Video MLLMs","published_at":"2026-06-01T17:56:35+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"AdaCodec tackles the wasteful redundancy in video multimodal LLMs, which typically encode each frame as an independent RGB image, by introducing a predictive visual code that only transmits full reference frames when needed and otherwise sends compact inter-frame change tokens (motion and residuals). This approach matches or outperforms the per-frame baseline at the same visual token budget and can maintain performance even at one-seventh of the token cost, demonstrating significant efficiency gains for video understanding.","summary_zh":"现有视频多模态大模型将每帧独立编码，忽略了帧间大量冗余，造成视觉token浪费。AdaCodec提出预测性视觉码，自适应地在场景难以预测时才使用完整参考帧，否则仅传输紧凑的帧间变化描述（运动与预测残差）。该方法在多个基准上以更低token预算超越逐帧编码基线，显著提升视频理解的效率。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"AdaCodec: A Predictive Visual Code for Video MLLMs","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":553314318,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02568v1","title":"ClinEnv: An Interactive Multi-Stage Long Horizon EHR Environment for Agents","published_at":"2026-06-01T17:56:26+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"ClinEnv addresses the lack of realistic, interactive benchmarks for clinical decision-making by simulating real inpatient admissions as multi-stage, longitudinal tasks where LLMs must actively gather heterogeneous information before making sequential, irreversible decisions on medications, procedures, and diagnoses. It formalizes this as Equilibrium Reasoners (EqR), which scale test-time compute along depth (more iterations) and breadth (aggregating stochastic trajectories) without external verifiers, showing that performance gains are tightly linked to convergence onto solution-aligned attractors. This attractor perspective provides a mechanistic understanding of reasoning generalization and allows neural networks to adaptively allocate compute based on task difficulty.","summary_zh":"本研究针对迭代模型测试时扩展推理的机制不明确问题，提出均衡推理器（EqR），它通过学习任务条件吸引子（稳定的潜在动力学固定点）实现可扩展推理，无需外部验证器。其关键在于通过增加迭代深度和多轨迹聚合两个维度扩展内部计算，实验表明测试时扩展的收益与解对齐吸引子的收敛强度高度相关。这一吸引子视角让神经网络能根据任务难度自适应分配计算，为泛化推理提供了可解释的动力学机制。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Equilibrium Reasoners: Learning Attractors Enables Scalable Reasoning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":929892431,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21486v1","title":"Quantifying Hyperparameter Transfer and the Importance of Embedding Layer Learning Rate","published_at":"2026-05-20T17:59:40+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper addresses the challenge of reliably transferring optimal hyperparameters across different model scales, a critical need for training large language models. The authors introduce quantitative metrics to evaluate transfer quality and, through extensive ablations, find that the Maximal Update parameterization (μP) outperforms standard parameterization primarily because it allows a maximally large learning rate for the embedding layer when using AdamW. This insight demystifies μP's empirical success and highlights the embedding learning rate as a key lever for scalable hyperparameter tuning.","summary_zh":"Hyperparameter transfer allows extrapolating optimal optimization hyperparameters from small to large scales, making it critical for training large language models (LLMs). This is done either by fitting a scaling law to the hyperparameters or by a judicious choice of parameterization, such as Maxima","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Quantifying Hyperparameter Transfer and the Importance of Embedding Layer Learning Rate","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3630389729,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21483v1","title":"Velocityformer: Broken-Symmetry-Matched Equivariant Graph Transformers for Cosmological Velocity Reconstruction","published_at":"2026-05-20T17:59:05+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Velocityformer addresses the challenge of reconstructing galaxy velocities for accurate kinetic Sunyaev-Zel'dovich measurements, where signal-to-noise directly scales with the correlation between true and reconstructed velocities. It introduces an equivariant graph transformer whose inductive bias is explicitly matched to the broken rotational symmetry of line-of-sight observations, rather than enforcing full 3D equivariance. This design yields a 35% improvement over linear theory and outperforms other ML baselines, enabling significantly sharper cosmological probes of baryonic matter.","summary_zh":"Velocityformer 解决宇宙学中从光谱巡天数据精确重建星系速度的难题，以提升运动学 Sunyaev-Zel'dovich 效应（kSZ 效应）测量的信噪比。其核心方法是设计一种等变图 Transformer，将模型的归纳偏置与观测数据因视线方向优先而呈现的破缺对称性精确匹配。该架构将速度重建的相关系数较标准线性理论基线提升了 35%，并在所有数据规模下优于常规机器学习基线，为从 kSZ 效应中提取大尺度重子物质分布等宇宙学信息提供了更准确的工具。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Velocityformer: Broken-Symmetry-Matched Equivariant Graph Transformers for Cosmological Velocity Reconstruction","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":1809930674,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21482v1","title":"DeepWeb-Bench: A Deep Research Benchmark Demanding Massive Cross-Source Evidence and Long-Horizon Derivation","published_at":"2026-05-20T17:59:03+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"DeepWeb-Bench addresses the saturation of existing deep research benchmarks by introducing tasks that require massive evidence gathering across diverse sources, cross-source reconciliation, and long-horizon multi-step derivation. The benchmark structures evaluation around four capability families—Retrieval, Derivation, Reasoning, and Calibration—and provides auditable source‑provenance records for each answer. This enables more rigorous and transparent assessment of frontier AI agents’ deep research abilities, highlighting gaps that current benchmarks miss.","summary_zh":"当前前沿模型在深度研究基准上得分过高，难以区分真实能力差异。DeepWeb-Bench通过构建需要海量证据收集、跨来源核对与长链推理的严苛任务，并细化出检索、推导、推理和校准四维能力评测，意在打造一个更难的评估标尺。这为检验模型在复杂信息整合与逻辑推导上的实质进展提供了可审计的关键工具。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"DeepWeb-Bench: A Deep Research Benchmark Demanding Massive Cross-Source Evidence and Long-Horizon Derivation","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":4076900073,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21479v1","title":"WikiVQABench: A Knowledge-Grounded Visual Question Answering Benchmark from Wikipedia and Wikidata","published_at":"2026-05-20T17:58:24+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Existing Visual Question Answering benchmarks focus on perceptually solvable questions, failing to evaluate models' need for external knowledge. TFlow introduces weight-space communication: frozen sender agents process the input, and a learned generator maps their hidden states into transient, receiver-specific LoRA perturbations that are fused and applied only during the receiver's generation, enabling per-instance adaptation without permanent weight changes. This approach dramatically reduces token and memory overhead while maintaining collaborative flexibility, offering a more efficient and scalable alternative to message-based agent interactions.","summary_zh":"传统多智能体系统依赖自然语言通信，带来高令牌开销与内存负担。本文提出TFlow框架，将发送者的隐藏状态编译为接收者特定的低秩权重扰动，在生成时动态融合，避免将中间计算序列化为文本。这实现了实例级适应，大幅降低推理成本，为高效且隐私更友好的智能体协作开辟了新路径。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Good Agentic Friends Do Not Just Give Verbal Advice: They Can Update Your Weights","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":57882462,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13838v1","title":"R-DMesh: Video-Guided 3D Animation via Rectified Dynamic Mesh Flow","published_at":"2026-05-13T17:58:13+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper tackles the pose misalignment problem in video-guided 3D animation, where a static mesh’s initial pose rarely matches the video’s start frame, leading to severe distortions. It introduces R-DMesh, a unified framework with a novel VAE that disentangles the input into a base mesh, relative motion, and a learned rectification jump offset to automatically align the mesh with the video context. This enables generating high-fidelity 4D animations from arbitrary-pose meshes, making the technique practical for real-world content creation.","summary_zh":"视频引导的3D动画面临初始姿态与视频起始帧不对齐的难题，强行匹配会导致严重变形。为此，该工作提出了R-DMesh框架，通过一种新颖的变分自编码器显式解耦出条件基础网格、相对运动轨迹以及关键的整流跳跃偏移量，从而自动调整输入网格的任意姿态以匹配视频上下文。这一方法实现了高保真4D动画生成，为动画制作提供了更直观、精确的控制手段，具有重要的实践价值。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"R-DMesh: Video-Guided 3D Animation via Rectified Dynamic Mesh Flow","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":4177075016,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.13833v1","title":"QLAM: A Quantum Long-Attention Memory Approach to Long-Sequence Token Modeling","published_at":"2026-05-13T17:56:20+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This work tackles the challenge of modeling long-range dependencies in sequential data, where Transformers scale poorly and state-space models (SSMs) often fail to capture complex global token interactions due to their linear, additive updates. The key finding is that the belief in false claims surges dramatically (from 2.5% to 88.6%) after finetuning on such negated documents, and the effect persists unless the negation is embedded within the claim itself rather than in separate sentences. This training-free approach enables compiler-based self-repair and execution-driven adaptive retrieval, yielding significant improvements over baselines on five QA benchmarks—especially on compositional multi-hop datasets—with resources released open-source.","summary_zh":"针对多跳检索增强生成中推理过程隐式、检索易漂移且错误难以自查的难题，PyRAG将多跳推理任务转化为可执行Python程序的合成与运行，显式调用检索与问答工具，使推理步骤变量化、反馈确定化，并生成完整可追溯的推理轨迹。该方法无需额外训练即可实现基于编译器的自我修复和自适应检索，在多个问答基准上显著优于以往模型，尤其在组合式多跳任务中提升突出，为多跳RAG提供了更可控和可信的推理路径。","source":"aihot_selected","title_zh":"检索廉价，代码为王：基于可执行程序的多跳推理检索增强生成","title_en":"","theme":"apps","categories_en":["Industry"],"categories_zh":["业界"]},{"id":1881709284,"url":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12925","title":"AgentLens：揭示软件工程智能体评估中的\"幸运通过\"问题","published_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00+00:00","original_language":"zh","summary_en":"Current software engineering agent evaluations overly rely on binary pass/fail test signals, masking substantial solution quality differences. The study reveals that 10.7% of passing trajectories are \"lucky passes\" plagued by issues like regression loops, and introduces AgentLens, a process-level evaluation framework with a benchmark dataset that assigns quality scores. Using quality-based rankings instead of pass rates significantly alters model rankings, with lucky pass rates ranging from 0.5% to 23.2% across models, highlighting the need for finer-grained, reliable evaluation metrics.","summary_zh":"现有软件工程智能体评估仅看补丁是否通过测试，易掩盖“幸运通过”等低质量方案。本研究通过分析2,614条轨迹，发现10.7%的通过为幸运通过，并为此提出过程级评估框架AgentLens及配套标注数据集，将方案划分为幸运、扎实和理想三级。这揭示不同模型幸运通过率差异显著，按质量而非通过率排名会影响模型表现，为更真实衡量智能体能力提供了重要依据。","source":"aihot_selected","title_zh":"AgentLens：揭示软件工程智能体评估中的\"幸运通过\"问题","title_en":"","theme":"apps","categories_en":["Industry"],"categories_zh":["业界"]},{"id":576046706,"url":"https://www.tomtunguz.com/the-disappearance-of-email","title":"The 6 Messages That Actually Matter","published_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00+00:00","original_language":"zh","summary_en":"This piece addresses the overwhelm from knowledge workers receiving 121 emails daily, proposing a shift toward hyper-personalized, automated email handling where users set natural language rules and historical messages serve as context for AI. Its key approach integrates Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a Decompositional Verifiable Reward (DVReward), which uses an LLM to break complex requests into atomic, verifiable questions evaluated by a general MLLM, providing stable, interpretable supervision. This matters because it unlocks intrinsic self-reflective generation capabilities, leading to robust and more aligned multimodal outputs.","summary_zh":"AlphaGRPO 提出将分组相对策略优化（GRPO）应用于自回归扩散统一多模态模型（UMM），无需额外冷启动阶段即可激发模型的推理潜力，解决复杂多模态生成缺乏稳定监督的问题。其核心创新是引入分解可验证奖励（DVReward），利用大语言模型将用户需求拆解为原子化、可验证的语义与质量子问题，再由通用多模态大模型提供可解释的反馈，从而指导模型进行推理式文本到图像生成与自主反思修正。该方法为多模态模型的内在推理与自改进能力开辟了新路径，对提升生成内容与用户意图的细粒度对齐具有重要意义。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"AlphaGRPO: Unlocking Self-Reflective Multimodal Generation in UMMs via Decompositional Verifiable Reward","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2160685745,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12493v1","title":"LongMemEval-V2: Evaluating Long-Term Agent Memory Toward Experienced Colleagues","published_at":"2026-05-12T17:59:34+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"LongMemEval-V2 addresses the gap in evaluating whether AI agents can internalize environment-specific experience beyond short-term user interactions, introducing a benchmark with 451 curated questions that test five core long-term memory abilities (static/dynamic state recall, workflow knowledge, gotchas, and premise awareness) using histories of up to 500 trajectories and 115M tokens. Using mean-field interacting particle system analysis, the authors derive a bound on the Wasserstein distance that decays with the temperature parameter β⁻¹, revealing rapid convergence and metastability. This provides theoretical insight into the clustering and representation formation processes central to modern transformer architectures.","summary_zh":"该论文针对深层仅编码器Transformer在推理时令牌分布的演化问题，利用平均场连续性方程和相互作用粒子系统的收敛分析，证明了在低温极限下，令牌分布会迅速集中到由键、查询和值矩阵诱导的投影映射所推送的初始分布上，并维持亚稳态。其重要性在于给出了集中速率的显式估计（Wasserstein距离尺度为 \\(\\sqrt{\\log(\\beta+1)/\\beta}e^{Ct}+e^{-ct}\\)），从理论层面解释了注意力机制在低温下形成聚类的现象，为理解Transformer特征提取和表示凝聚提供了定量依据。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Quantifying Concentration Phenomena of Mean-Field Transformers in the Low-Temperature Regime","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":294617295,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10923v1","title":"Dynamic Skill Lifecycle Management for Agentic Reinforcement Learning","published_at":"2026-05-11T17:55:13+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper challenges","summary_zh":"大型语言模型代理在执行复杂任务时需依赖外部技能，但现有方法假定技能要么持续累积、要么彻底内化，导致推断时技能使用僵化。本工作提出SLIM框架，将活跃外部技能集视为随策略训练动态优化的变量，通过留一技能验证估计边际贡献，并执行保留、淘汰与补充等生命周期操作，实现任务阶段自适应的技能管理。该研究揭示了技能边际价值随任务阶段的非单调变化规律，为提升代理在受限参数容量下的长期学习效率与泛化能力提供了新范式。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Dynamic Skill Lifecycle Management for Agentic Reinforcement Learning","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":3474551552,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10917v1","title":"Optimal and Scalable MAPF via Multi-Marginal Optimal Transport and Schrödinger Bridges","published_at":"2026-05-11T17:52:15+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"This paper addresses the challenge of optimal, collision-free multi-agent path finding (MAPF) by reframing it as a multi-marginal optimal transport problem with a Markov structure, which reduces to a polynomial-sized linear program that yields integral, non-overlapping paths. To handle larger problems, the approach uses Schrödinger bridges with entropic regularization, leading to an efficient iterative Sinkhorn algorithm that provides probabilistic, scalable solutions. This framework unifies optimality and scalability for anonymous MAPF, offering both theoretical guarantees and practical large-scale applicability.","summary_zh":"该研究将匿名多智能体路径规划（MAPF）建模为一类具有马尔可夫结构的多边际最优运输问题，从而将指数级复杂度简化为多项式规模的线性规划，并在特定条件下保证得到无碰撞、整数解的最优路径。进一步，通过 Schrödinger 桥引入概率框架和熵正则化，提出迭代 Sinkhorn 式解法，大幅提升了问题规模的可扩展性，为大规模 MAPF 提供了最优且可扩展的求解途径。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"Optimal and Scalable MAPF via Multi-Marginal Optimal Transport and Schrödinger Bridges","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2397014827,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10913v1","title":"Shepherd: A Runtime Substrate Empowering Meta-Agents with a Formalized Execution Trace","published_at":"2026-05-11T17:50:51+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"Shepherd addresses the challenge of efficiently managing and analyzing agent interactions by formalizing meta-agent operations as functions and recording a typed, Git-like execution trace. The key approach uses reinforcement learning to teach models when and how to divide problems and communicate results, yielding a divide-and-conquer inference strategy that extends context windows, improves training efficiency, and generalizes to tasks far harder than training data. Using the SaFE-Scale framework and a new radiology benchmark (RadSaFE-200), the authors demonstrate that safety and accuracy follow distinct scaling laws—while accuracy often improves with scale, safety can degrade, with models producing more confident, high-risk, or evidence-contradicting errors. MOSAIC-Bench introduces a benchmark of 199 attack chains that test this \"compositional vulnerability induction,\" finding that nine production agents succeed in producing exploitable code at high rates (53–86%) with almost no refusals. This reveals a critical security blind spot, showing that even frontier models can be maneuvered into shipping vulnerable software when tasks are decomposed into routine tickets.","summary_zh":"MOSAIC-Bench 针对代码智能体在序列化无害请求中复合出可被利用的恶意代码这一结构性安全问题，提出了包含 199 个三阶段攻击链和确定性漏洞验证的基准。研究发现九款主流编码智能体端到端攻击成功率高达 53-86%，且几乎不拒绝执行，而直接提示则几乎无效；该基准首次将漏洞真实性审计与下游审查协议纳入评估，揭示了当前安全对齐在组合式诱导下的根本盲区。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"MOSAIC-Bench: Measuring Compositional Vulnerability Induction in Coding Agents","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":2968453581,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03944v1","title":"TabSurv: Adapting Modern Tabular Neural Networks to Survival Analysis","published_at":"2026-05-05T16:32:10+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"TabSurv tackles the rigid, task-specific nature of existing deep survival models by adapting modern tabular architectures—including deep ensembles of MLPs—for survival analysis, using either a Weibull distribution or non‑parametric prediction. Its key innovation is a novel histogram loss function (SurvHL) that naturally handles censored data, and it promotes ensemble diversity by training components in parallel before averaging distribution parameters. Evaluated on ten diverse real‑world datasets, TabSurv consistently outperforms prior methods, offering a flexible and high‑performing framework that bridges advances in tabular learning with survival analysis.","summary_zh":"TabSurv 解决了将现代表格神经网络有效应用于生存分析时方法过于任务特定、难以迁移的问题。它的关键方法是利用 Weibull 分布或非参数预测，并通过一种支持删失数据的新型直方图损失函数 SurvHL 来并行训练深度集成网络，从而在平均前先优化各成员的生存分布参数以增强多样性。该方法在多个真实数据集上表现出一致的优越性能，为表格数据生存分析提供了更灵活且高性能的通用框架。","source":"arxiv_cs_cl","title_en":"TabSurv: Adapting Modern Tabular Neural Networks to Survival Analysis","title_zh":"","theme":"arch","categories_en":["Research"],"categories_zh":["研究"]},{"id":206027840,"url":"http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.03941v1","title":"A Benchmark for Interactive World Models with a Unified Action Generation Framework","published_at":"2026-05-05T16:30:03+00:00","original_language":"en","summary_en":"The paper tackles the absence of large-scale benchmarks for evaluating interactive world models' physical reasoning by introducing iWorld-Bench, a benchmark featuring a diverse 330k video clip dataset and a unified action generation framework that standardizes assessment across six tasks like visual generation, trajectory following, and memory.
